testcase.name: test_generate_expert_accepts_valid_request

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 520 assert 520 in [200, 201, 202, 402] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_new_features.py:183: in test_generate_expert_accepts_valid_request assert response.status_code in [200, 201, 202, 402], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 520 E assert 520 in [200, 201, 202, 402] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
